metadata.title:
CITY WINS
IN FIRST


INNING

Employment Agents Lose in
Effort to Compel Mayor


to Sign Licenses.
HJNKLE IS WITH CITY
Employment Agency 1njunc-
tion Suit Will be Heard


Tuesday.

pages.raw_text:
Mayor Pratt ana tne CITY mas won
the first, round in the legal battle
with the Unemployment agencies.


Judge Hinkle, in the superior
court. today refused TO issue writ
of mandamus compelling the mayor
to sign the licenses of the employ
ment agencies conducted by A.
Macho, Carr &c Hill and the Scan
dinavian-American, on Stevens
street.


Attorney Alex Winston, for the
employment offices, made a hard
fight to have the court grant the
writ, but Judge Hinkle could not
see 1t that way.


Next Tuesday there will be a
hearing on the suit in which these
\ same agencies have enioined Mayor
Pratt and Chief Sullivan from clos
ing the offices for want of a
license. A temporary injunction Is
sued by the superior court, return.
able Tuesday.


This last mentioned suit will go
